description_long: A male security guard is depicted wearing a formal, dark gray trench coat that extends to the knees, buttoned at the front and belted at the waist. He is dressed in matching dark trousers and black shoes, with a collared white shirt and a dark tie visible at the neckline. The guard's head is covered by a wide-brimmed, black fedora-style hat, partially shadowing his face and adding an air of authority and anonymity. His hands are gloved in light gray, and his overall attire is neat, professional, and consistent with private security personnel in urban environments. The uniform is devoid of visible insignia, badges, or equipment, emphasizing a clean and standardized appearance. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral, ready stance.
description: A male security guard in a dark trench coat, fedora hat, and formal attire stands upright with arms outstretched, exuding professionalism and authority.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, tie, collared shirt, and the full detail of the trench coat and hat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, nose, and the straight fall of the coat and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the trench coat, hat, and the symmetrical extension of both arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the guard's profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the coat's side and shoe.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal, dark gray trench coat with a belt, matching dark trousers, a collared white shirt, a dark tie, and a black fedora hat. The uniform is highly standardized, professional, and lacks visible variation or decorative elements, with black shoes and light gray gloves completing the ensemble.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a neutral, ready stance.
